themes.rationale: Private + private-style PSU banks benefiting from digital banking adoption + UPI ecosystem leadership

rule_definition.predicate: listing_year in [2020, 2021, 2022] AND sector in ['Consumer-services', 'Tech', 'Logistics'] AND was_loss_making_at_listing == True
